title: NEEDLE EXCHANGE - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a confidential needle exchange program including disposal of used syringes and distribution of new syringes and equipment (sharps containers, alcohol preps, and first aid supplies). Also provides drug checking supplies, naloxone and overdose response training, HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing, and safer sex supplies. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who use drugs or inject substances such as hormones or steroids, and their friends and family members Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 342-5088 209 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 ext 209 Needle Exchange Coordinator Alex Cribbs [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Medical Waste Disposal Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEPATITIS C CASE MANAGEMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY
